nasb.text: So Joseph’s master took him and put him into the jail, the place where the king’s prisoners were confined; and he was there in the jail.

esv.text: And Joseph’s master took him and put him into the prison, the place where the king’s prisoners were confined, and he was there in prison.

cnv.text: 於是，約瑟的主人拿住約瑟，把他關在監裡，就是王的囚犯被監禁的地方；約瑟就在那裡坐監。

ccb.text: 把约瑟关进王囚禁犯人的监牢。

csbs.text: 于是约瑟的主人把约瑟拿下，关进监狱，就是王的囚犯被囚的地方。约瑟就在那里坐牢。
